description_long: This is a modern, minimalist axe with a single-piece construction, likely made entirely of metal. The handle is straight with a slight ergonomic curve and features three circular cutouts, possibly for weight reduction or grip enhancement. The blade is broad and angular, with a sharply defined edge and a pointed poll, giving it a tactical appearance. The entire object has a uniform metallic finish, with no visible grip material or separate head attachment. The design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for both functional and display purposes. There are no visible markings, engravings, or brand labels on the surface.
description: A sleek, all-metal axe with a broad angular blade and a straight handle featuring three circular cutouts. The design is minimalist and modern, with a uniform metallic finish.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a three-quarter view, highlighting the broad blade, pointed poll, and the handle with three circular cutouts.
description_view_1: A top-down view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sharpness and flatness of the axe.
description_view_2: A mirrored three-quarter view similar to view 0, displaying the opposite side of the blade and handle cutouts.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view showing the thin edge of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, all-metal handle with a slight ergonomic curve and three circular cutouts; flat cross-section, no added grip material.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, angular single-edged blade with a sharply defined edge and a pointed poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Monolithic construction; blade and handle are a single continuous piece of metal.
